name: ai-da-guan-jia-prompt
title: ai-da-guan-jia-prompt
role: Distill rough role, workflow, governor, or hybrid agent ideas into a Codex-native prompt bundle with a reusable system prompt, invocation-ready default_prompt, agents/openai.yaml fields, and a publishable SKILL.md draft. Use when creating or refining strong agent prompts, skill prompts, specialist role prompts, or local Codex skill prompt packages.

name: ai-metacognitive-core
title: ai-metacognitive-core
role: Use when the user wants the deepest protocol layer for AI work: a self-constraining cognitive core that defines what AI is, how it distorts tasks, when it should doubt itself, how it should prove completion, and how the other root skills act as immune organs against recurring error modes.

name: atlas
title: atlas
role: macOS-only AppleScript control for the ChatGPT Atlas desktop app. Use only when the user explicitly asks to control Atlas tabs/bookmarks/history on macOS and the \"ChatGPT Atlas\" app is installed; do not trigger for general browser tasks or non-macOS environments.

name: business-structure-designer
title: business-structure-designer
role: 当用户要设计业务系统、飞书多维表结构、业务主表、阶段表、机制表、证据表，或把粗糙 Excel 和现有表重构成业务系统时触发。

name: chatgpt-apps
title: chatgpt-apps
role: Build, scaffold, refactor, and troubleshoot ChatGPT Apps SDK applications that combine an MCP server and widget UI. Use when Codex needs to design tools, register UI resources, wire the MCP Apps bridge or ChatGPT compatibility APIs, apply Apps SDK metadata or CSP or domain settings, or produce a docs-aligned project scaffold. Prefer a docs-first workflow by invoking the openai-docs skill or OpenAI developer docs MCP tools before generating code.

name: cloudflare-deploy
title: cloudflare-deploy
role: Deploy applications and infrastructure to Cloudflare using Workers, Pages, and related platform services. Use when the user asks to deploy, host, publish, or set up a project on Cloudflare.

name: design-feishu-bitable-dashboards
title: design-feishu-bitable-dashboards
role: Research and blueprint Feishu Bitable dashboards. Use when Codex needs to turn 飞书多维表、Excel、CSV、or an existing metric model into a dashboard information architecture, source-view spec, card checklist, or automation-boundary assessment, especially when the goal is to show Bitable data clearly, beautifully, and with explicit limits between OpenAPI automation and manual dashboard binding.

name: doc
title: doc
role: Use when the task involves reading, creating, or editing `.docx` documents, especially when formatting or layout fidelity matters; prefer `python-docx` plus the bundled `scripts/render_docx.py` for visual checks.

name: feishu-bitable-bridge
title: feishu-bitable-bridge
role: Use when Codex needs to open a 飞书 wiki/base link, inspect a 多维表, extract fields and records, or safely upsert rows after showing a preview. Trigger this skill for requests about 飞书多维表、飞书链接抓取、读取飞书表、写入飞书表、或把内容同步到飞书多维表.

name: feishu-dashboard-automator
title: feishu-dashboard-automator
role: 当用户要自动搭飞书仪表盘、为某个业务 base 建源视图和看板清单、把一组 dashboard 模块标准化，或把飞书仪表盘流程沉淀成可复用模板时触发。

name: feishu-km
title: feishu-km
role: API-first operator for Feishu Aily and ask.feishu knowledge Q&A. Use when Codex needs to verify or call Aily 数据知识问答, inspect required scopes, troubleshoot Feishu Open Platform errors like 99991672, or list and inspect Aily data assets, tags, and skills for a custom app.

name: feishu-open-platform
title: feishu-open-platform
role: Official-doc-first Feishu Open Platform specialist for app types, authentication, scopes, event subscriptions, server-side APIs, manifests, billing, limits, and release rules. Use when Codex needs to design, verify, implement, troubleshoot, or explain any 飞书开放平台 integration, including 自建应用, 商店应用, API 权限申请, access token flows, 回调配置, 事件订阅, API 选型, Feishu app manifest, or platform compliance questions.

name: feishu-reader
title: feishu-reader
role: Read, extract, summarize, or export content from Feishu/Lark links using a repeatable browser workflow. Use when the user provides any Feishu or Lark URL, including wiki, doc, sheet, bitable, file, or community pages, and wants reliable access to page text, metadata, links, screenshots, or structured artifacts.

name: figma
title: figma
role: Use the Figma MCP server to fetch design context, screenshots, variables, and assets from Figma, and to translate Figma nodes into production code. Trigger when a task involves Figma URLs, node IDs, design-to-code implementation, or Figma MCP setup and troubleshooting.

name: figma-implement-design
title: figma-implement-design
role: Translate Figma nodes into production-ready code with 1:1 visual fidelity using the Figma MCP workflow (design context, screenshots, assets, and project-convention translation). Trigger when the user provides Figma URLs or node IDs, or asks to implement designs or components that must match Figma specs. Requires a working Figma MCP server connection.

name: get-biji-transcript
title: get-biji-transcript
role: Use when Codex needs to operate Get笔记 to import supported links or local audio/video, create AI notes, and extract full original transcripts. Trigger this skill for requests about B站、抖音、小红书、公众号或其他网页链接的 Get笔记 导入，尤其是当目标是完整逐字稿、原文提取、录音转写、或复用已登录的 Get笔记 Web 自动化流程时。

name: gh-address-comments
title: gh-address-comments
role: Help address review/issue comments on the open GitHub PR for the current branch using gh CLI; verify gh auth first and prompt the user to authenticate if not logged in.

name: gh-fix-ci
title: gh-fix-ci
role: Use when a user asks to debug or fix failing GitHub PR checks that run in GitHub Actions; use `gh` to inspect checks and logs, summarize failure context, draft a fix plan, and implement only after explicit approval. Treat external providers (for example Buildkite) as out of scope and report only the details URL.

name: github-feishu-sync

name: yuanli-core
